name: EIA — U.S. Energy Information Administration
description: Official US energy data — crude oil spot + futures prices, refined product prices (gasoline, diesel, jet fuel, heating oil), natural gas, electricity retail + generation, coal, renewables, and country-level energy stats. Drives commodity markets, energy ETF/stock prices, transport-sector inflation expectations, and (less obviously) crypto mining cost discussions. Free, official, no rate limit cap. Sign up at https://www.eia.gov/opendata/register.php. v2 API is category-routed — paths like /petroleum/pri/spt/data fetch petroleum spot prices.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: EIA API Key
credential_fields.description: From https://www.eia.gov/opendata/register.php. Free, no cap. Email-based signup.

tools.name: browse_route
tools.description: Walk the EIA category tree to discover what data exists. Pass a route prefix (or empty string for root) and EIA returns the children + leaf-data-endpoints. Use to drill from 'petroleum' → 'pri' (prices) → 'spt' (spot) → 'data' (the time-series).

tools.name: get_data
tools.description: Fetch observations from a leaf-data route. Generic — works for any EIA series once you know the route. Apply facets to narrow by series, region, fuel type, etc. The agent typically calls browse_route first to find the right route + facet keys.

route.description: Leaf route, e.g. 'petroleum/pri/spt' for petroleum spot prices.

data[0].description: Data column to return — 'value' is the standard.

facets[series][].description: Series filter (route-specific). E.g. for petroleum/pri/spt: RWTC (WTI Cushing) or RBRTE (Brent).

tools.name: petroleum_spot_prices
tools.description: Helper for the most-asked-for series: petroleum spot prices (WTI, Brent, and refined products). Calls /petroleum/pri/spt/data with the right facets. Series codes: RWTC (WTI Cushing OK), RBRTE (Brent spot), EER_EPMRU_PF4_RGC_DPG (RBOB gasoline), EER_EPD2DXL0_PF4_RGC_DPG (Distillate).

tools.name: natural_gas_prices
tools.description: Helper: Henry Hub + other natural gas spot prices. Calls /natural-gas/pri/fut/data with futures or /natural-gas/pri/sum/data for spot summary. Henry Hub spot series = RNGWHHD.

tools.name: electricity_retail_sales
tools.description: Helper: US retail electricity sales by state + sector. Useful for tracking economic activity proxies + crypto-mining-region demand.

facets[stateid][].description: Two-letter state code (US, TX, CA, ...). Default: US (national total).
